messages.content: I can open apps and websites, search the web, check weather, send messages, set reminders, control YouTube, manage files, write code, and much more.
Yes, I do. I can save important personal information and preferences to my long-term memory, and recall them in future sessions.
I can save personal details like your name, preferences, goals, and projects. Just tell me the information, and I'll save it for later.
can you remeber things not saved
I can remember things from this current conversation, but my long-term memory is only for specific facts I've been instructed to save.
I do not have direct access to the previous session's context unless specific information was saved to memory.
